summary: Comprehensive testing of Live Pages (Dashboard, Alerts, Analytics) in LIVE mode. All 30 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed - LIVE badges displayed correctly, live data components render properly, no demo placeholders shown, no toast notifications on page load.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing data in database
context_for_next_testing_agent: Live Pages feature is fully functional. System is in LIVE mode. Backend: GET /api/dashboard/live returns signals_24h, active_agents, win_rate, accuracy, total_pnl, recent_alerts, agents. GET /api/alerts/live returns alerts array with action, asset, message, confidence, price, strategy_name, timestamp, is_demo. GET /api/analytics/live returns total_signals, avg_win_rate, sharpe_ratio, max_drawdown, by_pair, by_agent, daily arrays. Frontend: DashboardPage shows LiveDashboard component with 4 metric cards (Signals 24h, Active Agents, Win Rate, P&L) and 2 panels (Agent Status, Recent Alerts). AlertsPage shows LiveAlerts component with live alert feed, action badges (LONG/SHORT/CLOSE), assets, confidence, timestamps, auto-refresh 12s indicator. AnalyticsPage shows LiveAnalytics component with 4 stat cards and 4 charts (Signal Distribution, Win Rate by Pair, Agent Accuracy, Daily Signal Volume). All pages display LIVE badge in header. No demo placeholders shown. No toast notifications on page load.
